hero.title: Autocomplete
hero.subtitle: Type along each step and discover the design decisions behind the scenes.

basic.title: Start by typing
basic.description: The most basic form. The list filters as you type.
basic.insight: Setting debounceMs to 0 triggers instant filtering. For local data, zero-delay response feels natural.

async.title: While the network responds
async.description: This simulates a real API call with 500ms latency. Watch how the loading state communicates progress.
async.hint: Type slowly and observe the loading state
async.insight: Debounce prevents unnecessary requests, while the loading state signals that the system is working.

custom.title: Display it your way
custom.description: renderItem lets you fully customize each suggestion's appearance.
custom.hint: Notice how items display with their flags
custom.insight: renderItem extends beyond plain text — icons, images, badges, or any layout you need.

keyboard.title: No mouse required
keyboard.description: Every interaction works with the keyboard alone. Try it in the demo above.
keyboard.hint: Type, then navigate with arrow keys and select with Enter
keyboard.insight: Keyboard navigation serves both power-user efficiency and motor-disability accessibility.

a11y.title: Beyond what you see
a11y.description: Follows the WAI-ARIA Combobox pattern. Screen reader users get the same experience.

attrs.combobox: Declares the input as a combobox linked to a suggestion list
attrs.expanded: Communicates whether the list is open to screen readers
attrs.activedescendant: Lets screen readers announce the currently focused option
attrs.listbox: Identifies the suggestion list and each item's role

a11y.insight: Accessibility is not an add-on. ARIA attributes must be part of the design from the start so screen reader users experience the same flow.

descriptions.onInputChange: Called when input value changes (for async search)
descriptions.onSelect: Called when an item is selected
descriptions.renderItem: Custom render function for each item
descriptions.noResultsMessage: Message shown when no items match
